overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a desert shanty town settlement on the city outskirts. The character encounters a hostile NPC with cybernetic arms, then continues exploring the makeshift corrugated metal structures, passing by parked vehicles and scattered debris before approaching a small market area.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow enclosed alley between corrugated metal buildings. The player walks forward, passing a seated NPC on a bench to the right, then emerges into a more open area revealing a mobile home trailer and a satellite dish in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The player enters an open dirt courtyard surrounded by makeshift structures. Two NPCs are visible ahead, and as the player approaches, a man with prominent cybernetic arms confronts them aggressively, raising his mechanical fists while a woman watches from the side.

segments.scene_description: Moving past the confrontation site, the player walks through the settlement passing tire piles and trash bags. A green sedan is parked near a wooden shack, and distant city towers rise on the horizon. A child runs across the path ahead as the player approaches a more populated area.

segments.scene_description: The player passes the green sedan and enters a narrow enclosed passage between corrugated metal buildings. A neon arrow sign glows on the left wall, and the passage opens to a small courtyard with red plastic chairs, a worn couch, and a smoking barbecue grill before continuing up concrete stairs.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passage, the player enters an open area with a green dumpster and scattered trash piles. The camera approaches a wooden market stall on the left where a group of NPCs are gathered, browsing goods under an awning.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a claustrophobic shanty town that gradually opens into a bustling makeshift market. It begins in a narrow alley between corrugated metal buildings, passing a seated figure before emerging into a dirt courtyard where a man with cybernetic arms aggressively confronts the camera. Moving past the confrontation, the scene expands across a debris-strewn settlement featuring tire piles and a parked green sedan, with distant city towers looming on the horizon as a child runs across the path. The camera then ducks back into a tight passage marked by a glowing neon arrow, passing a small social area with a smoking barbecue and red plastic chairs before ascending concrete stairs. Finally, the view opens once more into a trash-strewn plaza, arriving at a wooden market stall where a group of NPCs gather under an awning.
